name: aether-api
description: Aether API - Unified monolith combining router, billing, platform, cron, and daytona-proxy

scripts.test: bun test src/__tests__/billing/credits.test.ts && bun test src/__tests__/billing/webhooks.test.ts src/__tests__/billing/subscriptions.test.ts src/__tests__/billing/yearly-rotation.test.ts src/__tests__/billing/account-deletion.test.ts && bun test src/__tests__/e2e-router.test.ts && bun test src/__tests__/e2e-billing-routes.test.ts && bun test src/__tests__/e2e-preview-proxy.test.ts && bun test src/__tests__/e2e-health.test.ts src/__tests__/e2e-version.test.ts src/__tests__/e2e-setup.test.ts src/__tests__/e2e-providers.test.ts src/__tests__/e2e-platform.test.ts src/__tests__/e2e-api-keys.test.ts src/__tests__/e2e-deployment.test.ts src/__tests__/e2e-deployments.test.ts src/__tests__/e2e-channels.test.ts src/__tests__/e2e-cron.test.ts src/__tests__/unit-*.test.ts
